notes: Policy revision manifest for outlets that previously had exactly one verified exact safe Wikimedia/Commons source. New threshold allows one exact safe source for automatic hero-only import. Do not download images in this task; importer dry-run only. Contains only reviewed exact Wikimedia Commons outlet sources with documented licenses; excludes official/operator-unpermitted sources.

reviewSummary.policy: One exact safe Wikimedia/Wikipedia/Commons/licensed/permission-granted outlet source is sufficient for automatic hero.webp import. Outlets with zero exact safe sources remain manual upload needed.
reviewSummary.notImported: This manifest is for dry-run validation only in this task; image import and metadata status promotion are intentionally deferred.

images.alt: Fuego sculpture at McArthurGlen Designer Outlet Málaga.
images.notes: Exact outlet image from Wikimedia Commons; used under documented CC BY-SA 4.0 license. Source page describes Fuego by Nic Fiddian Green as a 2022 sculpture for McArthurGlen Designer Outlet, Málaga. Hero-only candidate under the revised one exact safe source threshold.

Exact outlet image from Wikimedia Commons; used under documented CC BY-SA 4.0 license. Source page identifies Fashion Outlet Center in Montabaur / Montabaur The Style Outlets. Hero-only candidate under the revised one exact safe source threshold.
